title: Luffy Faces Hody
description: On pages 1–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is luffy faces hody.
scene: The scene follows luffy faces hody, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My heart is broken, so I've shaved my head!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: CAP'N DECKEN!! You'll get lucky someday!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Don't give me empty reassurances, you idiots!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I mean, sure, to begin with, Shirahoshii was still just a kid ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and I only decided to marry her for the sake of fulfilling my ancestors's dream ... but now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Not my type", she said. That was when I realised... truly, this was'love! ...I know it! - didn't fit the metre - by wander decken IX

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the worst thing is, I still haven't even managed to kill her!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can tell that, because the stuff I throw at her still keeps hurtling off into the distance! That straw hat brute is protecting her!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right... I should just crush them all in one fell swoop!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...ohhhh, I just had the most beeeea a beautiful idea!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: minister of the right!! Minister of the left!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...your wishes were finally going to come true ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: How did it come to this...?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...in just an hour's time... our beloved King will be murdered .....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ahhh... please, lend him your protection ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't get in....!! the entrance has been sealed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can hear those pirates whooping and howling inside....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's climb up to above the plaza! We should be able to see inside!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: GYoncord Plaza - execution ground of the King (also the place where queen Otohime was assassination)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah! I'm not sure if this is a good idea.

summary: Luffy Faces Hody. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
